message:
fix(mux): exclude quick terminal from layout restoration

Quick terminal panels should not be part of the regular tab layout.
Added isQuickTerminal flag to CREATE_PANEL message so server can
skip adding these panels to layout. This prevents quick terminal
from appearing after reload when it was closed.

- Add isQuickTerminal flag to Panel constructor and createPanel
- Send flags byte in CREATE_PANEL message (bit 0 = quick terminal)
- Server skips layout.createTab for quick terminal panels
- Add createPanelWithCwdAndLayout helper for conditional layout
